query: SELECT month, year, arrUsd, demosTotal, dialsTotal, retentionRate FROM monthly_metrics WHERE aeId = (SELECT id FROM ae_profiles WHERE name LIKE '%Joe%') AND year IN (2025, 2026) AND month IN (10, 11, 12, 1, 2) ORDER BY year, month;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute SELECT month, year, arrUsd, demosTotal, dialsTotal, retentionRate FROM monthly_metrics WHERE aeId = (SELECT id FROM ae_profiles WHERE name LIKE '%Joe%') AND year IN (2025, 2026) AND month IN (10, 11, 12, 1, 2) ORDER BY year, month;
